summary: Fixed CRITICAL bug: BOOKING_URL undefined error on 4 pages. All 8 pages now working. Full frontend testing complete - navigation, booking buttons, responsive design, gallery, FAQ accordions, Google Maps, all verified.

critical_bugs_fixed.root_cause: Missing import for BOOKING_URL from BookButton component
critical_bugs_fixed.fix_applied: Added import { BOOKING_URL } from '../components/BookButton' to all affected pages

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with all sections
Logo KleanLogo.jpg displayed correctly
Hero section: KLEAN title, 'Wear your crown & Stay Klean' subtitle, description
Google Reviews widget displays '40+ avis'
Navigation to all 8 pages works
Services page (Prestations) - now working after fix
VIP Experience page - now working after fix
Gallery page with 6 filters working
Gallery lightbox opens and closes
About page - now working after fix
Reviews page displays correctly
FAQ page with 10 accordion questions
Contact page with Google Maps iframe
All booking buttons use correct URL: https://klean-barbershop-booking.setmore.com/book
All booking buttons open in new tab (target='_blank')
Footer links: Instagram, phone, Google Maps address, booking button
Mobile menu toggle and navigation works
Mobile responsive design verified
Tablet responsive design verified
Images loading from customer-assets.emergentagent.com
critical_code_review_comments: Consider removing duplicate BOOKING_URL definitions in Reviews.jsx and FAQ.jsx and import from BookButton instead for DRY principle
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 pages now working. Fixed BOOKING_URL import issue in 4 pages. Site is fully functional - all features tested and verified.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: 4 page components (Services.jsx, VipExperience.jsx, Contact.jsx, About.jsx) referenced BOOKING_URL variable without importing it from BookButton component. The constant was defined in BookButton.jsx and exported, but these pages were using it directly without import. Fix: Added import statement to all affected files.
